allow: PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; Set-Location D:\\github_product\\"E-commerce Operations Plugins"\\E-commerce-Operations-Plugins\\backend; python test_page.py 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8100/api/v1/suggestions/generate" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "[OK] Generate suggestions: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output "[FAIL] Generate suggestions: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
